arts.sum: Carlisle's 2-0 win over Morecambe at the weekend has given them a real good chance of survival with just four games remaining. League leaders Port Vale know two victories over the Easter weekend woul...

arts.ttl: Carlisle United community sports trust shortlisted in EFL Awards
arts.sum: Carlisle United's Community Sports Trust have been shortlisted in the 2025 EFL Awards.
